audit_items.proof_trace: The function has exactly one allocation (q6afe_port_get_from_id) and one error path (IS_ERR check at L686-689). On that error path, q6afe_port_get_from_id returned ERR_PTR, meaning either the id validation failed before kzalloc or kzalloc itself failed — in both cases no live port object exists to free. After the IS_ERR check there are no further error returns; the port is immediately stored in dai_data->port[dai->id] and released by msm_dai_q6_dai_remove() via q6afe_port_put().
